query.searchTerm: name fragment to match. MUST be non-empty (empty -> HTTP 400).

body.hitsCount: breakdown by field matched (name, clientId, engagements, ...)
body.clients: array of { score, highlight, source } — `source` is the client object

success.sourceObject: { id, name, clientIdNumber, firmId, departmentId, isSensitive, isAssigned, engagementCounts {total, active, inactive, archived}, engagements (empty here), reports }

notes: Use to resolve a client the user named. `engagements` comes back EMPTY here — engagementCounts gives totals only; use getClientInfo for the actual engagement list. To enumerate the whole roster use v2_clients.json instead.
